question: Before relying on Stellar ecosystem recommendations, how fresh is the served index and what collection counts does it report now?

golden.answer: Call the live status endpoint, report generatedAt plus each relevant source's count and lastUpdatedAt, and explain collection-specific notes (including full-collection versus active-project denominators). Judge fitness relative to the requested use; never cite one global count or last-updated date for all sources.
keyFacts: Uses live status generatedAt and per-source count/lastUpdatedAt.
Preserves collection-specific notes and denominator distinctions.
Assesses freshness for the intended use rather than declaring the whole index fresh/stale.
avoid: Reports one archived project count or timestamp as the freshness of every collection.

corroboration.claim: Index freshness is per-source and requires current counts, lastUpdatedAt, notes, and use-relative interpretation.
One archived project count/timestamp describes every collection.
